name: dialog
title: Dialog
description: Modal dialog mirroring shadcn/ui v4. Thin Unistyles wrapper over @rn-primitives/dialog (Radix on web → focus trap + scroll lock + ESC; native → BackHandler + accessibilityViewIsModal). Reanimated v3 fade + zoom open/close. Built-in close button using @expo/vector-icons Feather X. 10 exports: Dialog, DialogTrigger, DialogPortal, DialogOverlay, DialogContent, DialogClose, DialogHeader, DialogFooter, DialogTitle, DialogDescription. Consumer must mount <PortalHost /> from @rn-primitives/portal once high in the app tree.
